{{Quote|The children of management are soft.|[[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]]|<ref name="X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]]</ref>}}
'''Ilir Post''' was the son of the director of the [[Allied Grain and Roughage]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Biography==
[[File:IlirPost.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Ilir Post is killed by [[Todr Fel]].]]
In [[11 BBY/Legends|11 BBY]], Post tried to assault [[Pamr]], but was prevented from doing so by [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]]. As a result, Post's father arranged for Fel to be sent to the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]], to prevent him from testifying at Ilir's [[Corellian Security Force|Corsec]] trial. This left Ilir with a hatred for Fel, however, Post later did time on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4.5 ABY]], he took [[Fyric Fel]] hostage, as an [[Mission to Corellia (Rogue Squadron)|attempt]] to find the location of [[Syal Antilles Fel|Wynssa Starflare]]. He was operating in league with a ranking Imperial, possibly [[Ysanne Isard]].

The plan was prevented by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] with the help of members of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. He was killed when Fyric's father, [[Todr Fel|Todr]], shot him in the head.

==Behind the scenes==
This Imperial character may be related to the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Avan Post]].
